who: procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual scorecard creation causes late performance reviews. We automate scorecard generation instead of manual scorecard creation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking vendor performance consistently.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers posts and comments on workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Community forums where procurement managers share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based scorecard generation and reports on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
